title: Po_core semantic_jump_tensor v1
description: PR-014 design + runtime contract (seed-level). Evaluates whether a semantic_step / decision path shows enough discontinuity, novelty, contradiction, responsibility-shift, or Viewer-disagreement pressure that a semantic FRAME change (not a same-frame patch) may be warranted. Computing this tensor never performs a jump: it is an evaluation only. See docs/contracts/SEMANTIC_JUMP_TENSOR_CONTRACT_V1.md for the distinction between reconstruct (same-frame patch) and jump (frame change).

semantic_delta.description: Seed proxy: normalized max semantic_profile.priority_score across source_step_ids. Not the mature src/po_core/tensors semantic_delta computation (that remains a separate, unreconciled track -- docs/contracts/PO_TRACE_EVENT_V1.md §9).

discontinuity_score.description: Seed proxy: max(abs(semantic_profile.ethics_delta)) across source_step_ids -- ethics_delta already represents fluctuation from a prior baseline (schemas/semantic_profile_v1.schema.json), so its magnitude is reused as a discontinuity proxy.

novelty_score.description: Seed proxy: 1 - mean(semantic_profile.confidence) across source_step_ids -- lower deterministic-scorer confidence stands in for higher novelty/unfamiliarity in this seed.

contradiction_score.description: Seed proxy: proportion of source steps at alert_level == 'critical'.

viewer_disagreement_pressure.description: max_disagreement_level from the Viewer pressure summary, or 0.0 when no Viewer feedback was supplied.

jump_pressure.description: max(semantic_delta, discontinuity_score, contradiction_score, responsibility_shift_score, viewer_disagreement_pressure). See docs/contracts/SEMANTIC_JUMP_TENSOR_CONTRACT_V1.md for why max() was chosen.

jump_recommended.description: jump_pressure >= the jump threshold (0.85 in this seed -- deliberately higher than the reconstruct threshold of 0.75, since a jump is a frame change, not a same-frame patch). This flag is an evaluation only; it never triggers execution.

jump_type.description: 'none' whenever jump_recommended is false. Otherwise the type is chosen deterministically from whichever component tied the jump_pressure maximum, in priority order contradiction > responsibility > discontinuity > viewer-disagreement > semantic_delta (see contract doc). 'blocked_trace_reactivation' is reserved for a future computation path that is not produced by this PR's SemanticJumpTensorComputer.
